name: France-IX Lyon/AURA Route Servers
notes:
FranceIX is running separated IXPs in several french cities. This entry only concerns the route-servers for the Lyon/AURA IXP.

- For Paris, please check [AS51706](https://www.peeringdb.com/net/8126).
- For Marseille, please check [AS42064](https://www.peeringdb.com/net/22868).
- For Toulouse, please check [AS47184](https://www.peeringdb.com/net/28829).
- For Lille, please check [AS62228](https://www.peeringdb.com/net/31200).
- For Bordeaux, please [AS212557](https://www.peeringdb.com/net/38716).
